info.description: REST API for Service General including Multi-DB, BPJS, and SatuSehat integrations.
info.title: GoPrint Service General API

get.description: Retrieve information about the currently active token/user

post.description: Authenticate user and return JWT & Refresh tokens
Logout current user and blacklist the token
Refresh expired access token using refresh token

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of RoleMaster
Search RoleMaster records using dynamic filters
Retrieve detailed information about a specific RoleMaster

put.description: Update details of an existing RoleMaster record by ID

delete.description: Delete a RoleMaster record by ID (soft delete)

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Role Pages

post.description: Create a new Role Pages record

get.description: Search Role Pages records using dynamic filters
Retrieve a hierarchical tree of Role Pages
Retrieve a hierarchical tree of Role Pages up to a specific level
get.summary: Get tree of Role Pages by level

get.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Role Pages

put.description: Update details of an existing Role Pages record by ID

delete.description: Delete a Role Pages record by ID

get.description: Retrieve a paginated list of Role Permissions

post.description: Create a new Role Permission record

get.description: Retrieve a permission tree by Keycloak role
Search Role Permissions records using dynamic filters
Retrieve a permission tree
Retrieve detailed information about a specific Role Permission

put.description: Update details of an existing Role Permission record by ID

delete.description: Delete a Role Permission record by ID

get.description: Mendapatkan token aktif untuk API Satu Sehat Kemenkes (menggunakan cache internal)

post.description: Memaksa request token baru dari API Satu Sehat Kemenkes (bypass cache)

get.description: Mengambil daftar produk KFA dengan kapabilitas paginasi
Mencari detail produk farmasi/alkes dari API Kamus Farmasi dan Alat Kesehatan (KFA) Satu Sehat
Mencari data Location berdasarkan parameter
Mencari data Location FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan ID
Mencari data Organization berdasarkan Name atau PartOf
Mencari data Organization FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan ID
Mencari data pasien FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan kombinasi parameter (Nama, NIK, NIK Ibu, Tanggal Lahir, Gender)

post.description: Mendaftarkan data pasien baru ke API Satu Sehat dan mengembalikan IHS Number

get.description: Mencari data pasien FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan Nomor Induk Kependudukan (NIK)
Mencari data pasien FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan IHS Number / ID
Mencari data Practitioner FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan parameter
Mencari data Practitioner FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan NIK
get.summary: Cari Tenaga Medis (Satu Sehat) berdasarkan NIK

get.description: Mencari data Practitioner FHIR Satu Sehat berdasarkan IHS Number / ID
get.summary: Cari Tenaga Medis (Satu Sehat) berdasarkan ID

provider.description:
Provider membantu membedakan antara "jwt" dan "keycloak".
Ini membuat endpoint menjadi fleksibel.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
